prompt.content: Using the 'bamboo_employees.csv' HRIS employee data, generate a custom report showing the average gender pay gap by division, calculated as the average annual salary for men minus the average annual salary for women. State the average pay gap between men and women for each division in dollars, rounded to the nearest dollar. Ignore employees who are non-binary or who preferred not to specify their gender, as well as inactive or terminated employees. If a division does not have a mix of both male and female employees, consider that division to have a pay gap of zero. Output your results in console.
